title: RuntimeValidationState
description: Output of Phase 0 runtime validation. Written to state/runtime-validation.json. Read by Phase 1 setup files.

subtree.description: Relative path to the app subtree ('.' if root).

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the main execution entry-point file (e.g. src/main.py, src/index.ts, cmd/server/main.go). Phase 1 uses this to place tracer init and session boundaries.

framework.description: Detected LLM/agent framework, or 'native' if none.

framework_version.description: Pinned version from manifest. Null if not detected.

existing_hh_wiring.description: Existing HoneyHive init calls. Empty array if none.

existing_otel_provider.description: Provider state: none, proxy-noop, real:<vendor>, or real:custom-mutating.

existing_provider_ref.description: File and line of the provider registration. Null if none/proxy.

conflicts.description: Detected conflicts (dual instrumentors, multiple tracers, etc.). Empty if clean.
